title: Key LV Machines
discoveryHint: Craft LV machines to learn about them.

sections.text: The Wiremill is arguably the most important first LV machine. It converts ingots directly into wires, which is much more efficient than hand-crafting. The Bending Machine is the second priority, converting one Ingot into one Plate instead of the 2:1 ratio from hand-hammering.

The Lathe shapes metals into rods and screws. The Polarizer converts Redstone-related recipes cheaply. The Chemical Reactor opens up a huge array of chemical synthesis recipes. The Assembler automates complex crafting recipes.
